summary_en: ToSTNeT-3 buyback program (authorized: 600,000 shares, ¥426M ceiling, 6.2% of S/O) terminated. Transaction failed on 2026-05-22 when counterparty (major shareholder) did not submit sell order. Zero shares acquired.
title_en: Notice of Failed Acquisition and Termination of Treasury Stock Acquisition via ToSTNeT-3 Off-Hours Trading
translation_en_brief: Izawa Towel announced on 2026-05-22 that a treasury stock acquisition via ToSTNeT-3 off-hours trading has failed and the program is terminated. The company had authorized acquisition of up to 600,000 shares (6.2% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) for a maximum of ¥426M. The transaction was scheduled for 2026-05-22 following a prior announcement on 2026-05-21. The acquisition was intended to enhance shareholder returns while avoiding market supply-demand imbalance, having been triggered by a major shareholder's indication to sell holdings. However, the major shareholder did not submit a sell order on the scheduled date, resulting in transaction failure. Zero shares were acquired at zero yen. The company stated that capital efficiency improvement and enhanced shareholder returns remain core management priorities, and it will continue to flexibly pursue optimal capital policies including future treasury stock acquisitions based on market conditions and stock price movements.
